# Warm & Crumbly

Warm & Crumbly is a small local bakery based in Brooklyn, NY, specializing in cookies and curated cookie boxes. The name evokes a cozy, homemade warmth with an artisanal feel, suggesting a neighborhood gem with a personal touch and a passion for baked goods.

Source: https://warm-crumbly.zappy5.app

---

## Crave-Worthy Homemade Cookies in NY — Warm &amp; Crumbly

URL: https://warm-crumbly.zappy5.app
Description: Sink your teeth into Brooklyn&#39;s most irresistible homemade cookies and curated cookie boxes from Warm &amp; Crumbly. Freshly baked, artisanal treats delivered with a personal touch. Order your box today!

# Handmade Cookies & Curated Gift Boxes from Brooklyn


### Warm from the oven, wrapped with care. Every box brings the neighborhood bakery to your door.

## Shop by Category


Loading products...









## Baked Fresh, Gifted Warm


From our Brooklyn kitchen to your table, every batch is crafted with care. We believe great cookies start with simple ingredients, a lot of love, and a little bit of magic.








### Small-Batch Baking


We bake in limited quantities throughout the day, ensuring every cookie you bite into is impossibly fresh, with a perfectly chewy center and crisp golden edge.









### Curated Cookie Boxes


Thoughtfully designed for gifting, our signature boxes combine seasonal flavors and classics, wrapped with bakery paper and tied with a bow. Perfect for busy families and gift buyers.









### Local Brooklyn Soul


We're a neighborhood gem inspired by the energy of Brooklyn. Our recipes nod to local flavors and we love being a part of your everyday moments and celebrations.

















HANDMADE IN BROOKLYN































What Our Neighbors Say


## Baked with Love, Shared with Joy


From Brooklyn stoops to holiday tables, hear why our cookie boxes have become a local tradition.












"I sent a curated cookie box to my sister in Manhattan for her birthday and she called me crying happy tears. The packaging was so beautiful she didn't want to open it — but once she did, the cookies were gone in a day. Warm & Crumbly has become my go-to for every gift."



— Elena R.
Gift Giver, Park Slope


Sent a birthday box across the bridge — arrived fresh and perfect.










"With three kids, getting to the bakery is a whole production. Warm & Crumbly's online ordering is a lifesaver. We do the family sampler every other week and the kids get so excited when the box arrives. It's our little Friday ritual now."



— Marcus T.
Dad of Three, Cobble Hill


Family sampler subscriber — Friday cookie night tradition.










"I ordered the holiday cookie box for our office party and it stole the show. Everyone kept asking where I got them. The gingerbread snaps and peppermint bark cookies were incredible — you can taste the real ingredients. Already planning my next order."



— Priya K.
Office Manager, DUMBO


Holiday box for the team — stole the show at the party.


















## Our Giftable Gallery


Every box is a Brooklyn moment — unwrap layers of homemade comfort, curated with care and ready to share.








The Classic Warmth — Our signature chocolate chip, fresh from the oven.






Curated Boxes — Thoughtfully arranged for every occasion.



Stacked & Ready — The perfect Brooklyn gift.






From Our Table to Yours — Homemade comfort, crafted in Brooklyn.





























## Ready to Share the Warmth?


Whether you're planning a celebration, curating the perfect gift, or simply craving something sweet, our Brooklyn-baked cookie boxes bring homemade comfort to every occasion. Let's create something crumbly together.

## Gift the Ultimate Cookie Boxes — Warm &amp; Crumbly

URL: https://warm-crumbly.zappy5.app/gift-boxes
Description: Surprise someone special with our signature curated cookie boxes, packed with warm, crumbly perfection. Handcrafted in Brooklyn for any occasion. Design your delicious gift now!

Gift the Ultimate Cookie Boxes — Warm & Crumbly

Products






















Curated Gifting

# Cookie Boxes for Every Occasion


From client appreciation to holiday hosting, our curated cookie boxes bring the warmth of our Brooklyn bakery to your doorstep. Each box is thoughtfully arranged with our signature homemade cookies, wrapped in parchment and tied with care — a gift that feels personal, artisanal, and delightfully crumbly.


Whether you're celebrating a seasonal moment, surprising a loved one, or sending a heartfelt thank-you, Warm & Crumbly cookie boxes are designed to make every recipient feel special. We work with you to customize flavors, packaging, and presentation for your unique gifting needs.

Inquire About Custom Boxes




















Why Gift With Us


## Handcrafted Cookie Boxes, Made for Sharing


From Brooklyn with love — our curated cookie boxes bring together easy gifting, polished presentation, and crowd-pleasing flavors that make every occasion feel special.











### Effortless Gifting


Skip the stress of finding the perfect present. Our beautifully packaged cookie boxes are ready to delight — just choose your box, and we'll handle the rest. Perfect for busy professionals and last-minute holiday shoppers.









### Polished Presentation


First impressions matter. Each box is wrapped with artisanal care — tissue-lined interiors, hand-tied ribbons, and a personalized note — so your gift looks as extraordinary as it tastes.









### Crowd-Pleasing Flavors


From classic Chocolate Chunk to Brown Butter Snickerdoodle, our curated selections are built to please every palate. Taste-tested and approved by families, colleagues, and cookie connoisseurs across Brooklyn.









### Local Brooklyn Craft


Every cookie is baked fresh in our Brooklyn kitchen using locally sourced ingredients. When you send a Warm & Crumbly box, you're sharing a genuine taste of our neighborhood's vibrant food community.

















## Thoughtfully Packaged,Brooklyn-Style


Every Warm & Crumbly box is wrapped like a personal gift, with bakery tissue, hand-tied ribbon, and a wax-seal tag. It’s an unboxing moment that feels as good as the first bite.

































## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about our cookie boxes and gifting experience





### Are these cookie boxes suitable for gifting?


Absolutely. Every Warm & Crumbly box is designed as a gift-first experience. From the hand-tied baker's twine to the parchment lining and custom note card, our packaging makes each box feel like a personal gesture straight from a Brooklyn kitchen. Whether it's a birthday, a thank-you, or just because, our curated cookie boxes arrive ready to delight.





### What makes Warm & Crumbly a true local Brooklyn bakery?


We bake in small batches right here in Brooklyn, NY, using locally sourced ingredients whenever possible. Our recipes are rooted in neighborhood tradition — think brown butter chocolate chip cookies that taste like they came from a friend's kitchen — and our packaging reflects the borough's creative, artisanal spirit. Every box carries a little piece of Brooklyn with it.





### How is the presentation quality for special occasions?


We treat presentation as an essential ingredient. Each cookie is nestled in custom-fit crinkle paper inside a sturdy, beautifully branded box. A wax seal or signature sticker adds the finishing touch. For corporate gifting or large celebrations, we offer elevated packaging upgrades, including ribbon wraps and personalized gift messages, ensuring your homemade cookies make a memorable impression.





### Do you offer seasonal or limited-edition cookie boxes?


Yes — seasonality is at the heart of our bakery. Throughout the year we release limited-edition boxes featuring flavors inspired by the season: spiced molasses crinkles for autumn, peppermint bark cookies for the winter holidays, and bright lemon-lavender shortbread for spring. Follow our newsletter or Instagram to be the first to know when a new collection drops.





### How can I request a custom box or large order?


We love collaborating on custom orders. Simply reach out through our contact page with details about your event, preferred flavors, quantity, and any dietary notes. Our team typically responds within 24 hours with a personalized proposal, pricing, and a timeline. For weddings, corporate events, or wholesale inquiries, we recommend reaching out at least two weeks in advance.





### Who are these curated boxes ideal for?


Our cookie boxes are crafted for anyone who appreciates thoughtful, high-quality baked goods. They're perfect for busy professionals sending client gifts, long-distance friends wanting to share a taste of cookies in NY, new parents who deserve a sweet pick-me-up, and hosts looking for a stunning edible centerpiece. If you believe food is love, our boxes speak your language.







Still have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

Get in Touch













## Let's Plan Your Perfect Gift Box


Whether you're curating a thoughtful corporate thank-you, planning a seasonal cookie celebration, or simply sending a warm Brooklyn hug to someone special — we'd love to help you design a gift box that feels personal, thoughtful, and irresistibly crumbly.

Get in Touch About Gifting

## Meet the Bakers Behind Your Cozy Cravings — Warm &amp; Crumbly

URL: https://warm-crumbly.zappy5.app/about
Description: Discover the story of Warm &amp; Crumbly, a neighborhood gem in Brooklyn, NY, where every batch of homemade cookies is baked with passion and a personal touch. Come taste the love!

Meet the Bakers Behind Your Cozy Cravings — Warm & Crumbly













































Skip to main content

















- Products Products
















- Home
- Gift Boxes
- About
- Contact
0













Products














# Our Story


Warm & Crumbly was born from a simple belief: that the best moments in life are shared over something warm, sweet, and made with love. What started as a tiny kitchen experiment in a Brooklyn apartment has grown into a beloved neighborhood bakery, where every cookie tells a story of comfort, craftsmanship, and community.


We believe in the magic of real ingredients — European-style butter, rich dark chocolate, and a pinch of nostalgia in every batch. Our bakery is a place where the scent of freshly baked cookies drifts onto the sidewalk, inviting neighbors and visitors alike to pause, indulge, and feel at home.


### Rooted in Brooklyn, Shared with Love


From our small storefront in the heart of Brooklyn, we handcraft each cookie and curated cookie box with the same care we'd offer a friend. Every order is an invitation to experience the warmth of our kitchen, no matter where you are.






















## Baked with Heart, Rooted in Brooklyn





### The Warmth of Home


Every batch we pull from the oven is rooted in the comfort of a home kitchen. We believe a cookie isn't just a treat—it's a moment of pause, a memory of grandma's table, and the simplest way to share a smile across a crowded counter.





### Handcrafted, Never Rushed


We mix our doughs in small batches, fold in the chocolate by hand, and watch each tray with a baker's patience. No shortcuts, no assembly lines—just the slow, deliberate craft that transforms butter, flour, and sugar into something worth waiting for.





### Thoughtful Gifting, Brooklyn-Style


Our curated cookie boxes are designed to feel like a gift from a neighbor. Wrapped with care and filled with seasonal flavors, each box carries the spirit of our block in Brooklyn—generous, personal, and always baked fresh for the people you love.





















## Baked in Small Batches, Wrapped with Care


Every box that leaves our Brooklyn kitchen starts with a rhythm that can’t be rushed. We mix dough in small, deliberate batches — never more than a dozen cookies at a time — so each one gets the attention it deserves. As the scent of browned butter and melted chocolate fills the room, we pull trays from the oven at the exact moment the edges turn golden and the centers stay soft. The result is a cookie that feels like it was baked just for you, because it was.


Once cooled, each cookie is nestled into our signature gift boxes by hand. We layer parchment between the layers, tie the box with a linen ribbon, and tuck a handwritten tasting note inside — because the unboxing should feel as thoughtful as the baking itself. From our oven to your doorstep, every step is designed to deliver warmth, crumble, and a little bit of Brooklyn magic.


















## Loved by the Neighborhood










"Warm & Crumbly isn't just a bakery — it's a feeling. Every cookie box feels like a handwritten letter from a friend. The presentation is stunning, the flavors are nostalgic yet refined, and you can taste the care in every crumb. It's become my go-to gift for every occasion."



— Elena M., Park Slope










"I ordered a custom cookie box for my sister's baby shower and it was the highlight of the party. The packaging alone made everyone gasp — and then they tasted the cookies. Absolutely magical."



— James K., Williamsburg







"There's something so special about walking into their little shop. It smells like heaven and feels like home. The chocolate chip cookies are the best I've ever had — perfectly chewy with that hint of sea salt. Pure Brooklyn magic."



— Sofia R., Carroll Gardens





















## Ready to Taste the Warmth?


Whether you're craving a dozen of our signature homemade cookies, building the perfect curated cookie box for a special occasion, or simply want to say hello to your friendly neighborhood bakery in Brooklyn — we'd love to hear from you. Every order is baked fresh with the same care we'd put into a gift for our own family.

## We'd Love to Hear From You


Whether you're planning a family celebration, curating the perfect gift, or dreaming up treats for the holidays, our Brooklyn bakery is here to help.












### Our Brooklyn Kitchen


Nestled in the heart of Brooklyn, NY, Warm & Crumbly bakes every batch fresh from our neighborhood kitchen. While we're primarily an online bakery, the spirit of our local community is baked into every cookie box we ship.


📍
Hashlosha 4, Brooklyn, NY, 42836, US

### Preferred Contact Channels


For the fastest response regarding custom orders, gifting, or wholesale inquiries, please reach out via email or give us a call during business hours. We aim to respond within 24 hours.

From personalized cookie boxes for family celebrations to corporate gifting and holiday planning, we specialize in making your moments sweeter. Let us know what you're dreaming up, and we'll craft the perfect batch.

## Our Neighborhood Bakery


Nestled in the heart of Brooklyn, Warm & Crumbly is your neighborhood destination for handcrafted cookies and curated cookie boxes. We bake in small batches daily, filling our corner of the borough with the aroma of brown butter, toasted sugar, and melted chocolate.


Whether you're stopping by for a fresh-from-the-oven treat or sending a beautifully wrapped gift box across the city, our bakery doors are always open with a warm welcome. Come visit us and taste the crumbly difference that homemade cookies in NY can make.






Hashlosha 4, Brooklyn, NY, 42836, US





Open Tue–Sun, 8am–6pm















## Gifting Made Personal


From our Brooklyn kitchen to your table, every box is packed with warmth, care, and the irresistible aroma of homemade cookies. Have a question? We'd love to help you find the perfect treat.

## Return Policy

Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Warm & Crumbly




































































- Products Products
















- Home
- Gift Boxes
- About
- Contact
0












Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/13/2026



At Warm & Crumbly, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: maor@zappy5.com


Phone: +972543951940


Address: Hashlosha 4, Brooklyn, NY, 42836, US

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/10/2026



Warm & Crumbly ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website https://warm-crumbly.zappy5.app ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Warm & Crumbly

- Email: maor@zappy5.com

- Phone: +972543951940

- Address: Hashlosha 4, Brooklyn, NY, 42836, US



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 10, 2026



Warm & Crumbly is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Warm & Crumbly

- Email: maor@zappy5.com

- Phone: +972543951940



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 10, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Warm & Crumbly

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Food & Beverage provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Warm & Crumbly provides Food & Beverage through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Warm & Crumbly. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Warm & Crumbly

- Email: maor@zappy5.com

- Phone: +972543951940

- Address: Hashlosha 4, Brooklyn, NY, 42836, US
